NOTO · Quick Commerce · May 2026

Category Whitespace & Competitive Intelligence Dashboard

Top-15 locality leaderboards across Blinkit, Zepto & Instamart — Platform × City × Locality × SKU
Scope note: Source workbook tracks non-NOTO category SKUs (dessert/ice-cream leaderboard, "Noto-branded SKUs excluded") — i.e. this is competitor & category demand intelligence, not NOTO's own sales. Each row is a Top-15 locality leaderboard entry per Platform×City×SKU cut, so totals reflect leaderboard depth, not full transactional volume. Use this to find where category demand is concentrated and where NOTO has whitespace to win share.
